post.message: Source file src/routes/client.routes.js was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.
post.judgeRationale: judge dissented: The PR title claims to fix search, and the diff modifies the `normKB` function which normalizes strings for comparison, directly affecting the search logic.

post.message: Source branch added in src/routes/client.routes.js with no compensating test addition in this PR. Likely coverage erosion.
